aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TableRowsSplit;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TableRowsSplit { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
spreadsheet, grid, cut, break, divide, separate, segment

## Categories
text, files

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/table-rows-split)
